<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnChatPage/CnChatPage.vue -->

### Props

| Name                 | Type      | Required | Default                                                      | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| -------------------- | --------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`              | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Conversation')`                | Page title.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `description`        | `string`  |          | `''`                                                         | Description shown under the title when `showTitle` is set.                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `showTitle`          | `boolean` |          | `false`                                                      | Whether to render the inline page header.                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `icon`               | `string`  |          | `''`                                                         | MDI icon name for the header.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `conversationSource` | `string`  |          | `''`                                                         | URL of the embedded conversation (NC Talk iframe URL by default). Required for v1 unless the consumer supplies a `#conversation` slot.                                                                                                  |
| `postUrl`            | `string`  |          | `''`                                                         | Custom thread-API endpoint. Used by consumers building their own chat UI via the `#conversation` slot. The value is passed through unchanged in the slot scope.                                                                         |
| `schema`             | `string`  |          | `''`                                                         | OpenRegister schema slug for an OR-backed conversation. Reserved for v2 native thread rendering.                                                                                                                                        |
| `sandbox`            | `string`  |          | `'allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms allow-popups'` | `sandbox` attribute on the iframe. Defaults to a minimal permissive set: scripts + same-origin (so NC Talk can call back into its own origin) + forms. Override at the manifest level when an embed needs more (or fewer) capabilities. |
| `emptyText`          | `string`  |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No conversation selected')`    | Empty-state text shown when no conversation source is set.                                                                                                                                                                              |

### Slots

| Name           | Bindings                                    | Description |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `header`       | `title`, `description`, `icon`              |             |
| `actions`      | —                                           |             |
| `conversation` | `conversation-source`, `post-url`, `schema` |             |
| `empty`        | —                                           |             |
